name: Eternal Sugar Cookie // The Pinky Bitch
description:
"Have no fear, I will be gentle!"

Theres is no fucking way NO ONE talked about the music I choose for this bot like u even seen the lyrics?? And the melody rithym is ETERNAL SUGAR vibes. This fucking got me outraged, so I updated a new scenario just to you listen that shit. I know the lyrics are supposed to reflect Lilith, and the garden mentioned in the lyrics is Eden, but STILL.

AND. . .

You received the bot update notification. This isn't just any update— well, it's also an update. This Eternal Sugar bot is one of my best creations. It easily makes my top 10 (I have 200 bots, bro).

I mean, besides updating more bots, I'm going to make private some bots that I don't like. Like Layla bot. I made it private. I know that one had almost 100k msgs. I don't care. If I don't like it, I make it private.

But why didn't I make my Kendall bot private if I hate it so much? Well, this is also a rant.

I HATE KENDALL.

I tried to make it private, but I received some comments asking for it back, so I had no choice but to bring it back. Today it's my most famous bot. Why do I hate this bot so much? It's simple. I didn't put any effort into it. I grabbed a random image, put in a generic bully backstory with a sad past, and lazily created the personality. Seeing a bot like this, which I barely put any effort into, reach the top spot, while bots I liked doing (like Karmelita or Cyn), and that I put my heart into creating each creative scenario, don't even catch attention, irritates me.

I know this should be a hobby and I should make bots as a pastime. And I do. But still, seeing something like this makes me tired. Seriously, is a generic image with a generic backstory worth more than my effort?

Sorry for the rant. Enjoy your new Eternal Sugar scenario, which DEFINITELY has nothing to do with one of my private bots. See ya ^^

(Oh yeah, I'll be making some minor upgrades to the personality section of my bots. SPOILER: FEM!JOHNNY NEXT.)

☆.˚.˚.˚.˚༺♥︎༻˚.˚.˚.˚.☆

SUGÆRRRRRRRRR!!

Wow Another bot that's a combination of my private bots?? Innovative. I should do this more often, then I'd have a bot with 33 initial messages just about one FPE character lol

"NoOooO shE is nOt intO mAleS thIS caNt be aNy PoV!"

Go --> ★~ f u c k ~♥︎ <-- yourself.

ETERNAL SUGAR COOKIE

Eternal Sugar Cookie (Korean: 이터널슈가 쿠키, iteoneol-syuga kuki) is one of the five Beast Cookies of Cookie Run: Kingdom.

Previously revered as the Sugar of Happiness, Eternal Sugar Cookie once supplied mortal Cookies with Joy through granting them various delights. With time marching on and Cookies nonetheless falling to pain and despair, she began to believe that the world's fragile Cookies cannot achieve true Happiness in the infinite suffering of everyday life. Still claiming to be the Bringer of Happiness, Eternal Sugar Cookie now oversees the paradisaical Garden of Delights and works towards a day when all Cookies can live in blissful, indolent escapism free from deep thought and mundane worries.
creator: LifelessManiac
